flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Dodge City Community College rose 40% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.3k → $4.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Dodge City Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Dodge City Community College fell 14% between 2006 and 2009 (34.1% → 29.4%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Dodge City Community College rose 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.8k → $8.8k).
